summary: Iteration 23: Testing Case Completion Engine - Badge and PDF Report generation. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: Verified via Playwright - procedure detail page loads correctly with Download Case Report PDF button visible for non-completed procedures, no gold badge shown (correct behavior). Browser session persistence issue in Expo Web app affected some UI tests.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend badge endpoint correctly returns {badge: null} for non-completed procedures (line 1179)
Backend case-report PDF endpoint works for ANY procedure regardless of status
Backend PDF generation uses fpdf2 with proper multi-page layout including all 4 phases
Backend badge generation is triggered on Phase 4 completion (lines 2324-2341)
Backend badge doc excludes _id field (line 1177) - no ObjectId serialization issues
Frontend CaseCompletionBadge component has correct data-testid='download-case-report-btn'
Frontend shows gold badge ONLY for status='completed', otherwise just report button (lines 78-98)
Frontend CaseImplantPlanning component correctly displays 3/6 implant count

success_rate.frontend: Partially verified - UI loads correctly, some session issues in Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: Procedure 699fbfa15279dfa7819789b8 is now in pending_stage2_surgical status (was incorrectly noted as pending_phase1 in request). Badge endpoint returns null since not completed. Case Report PDF works for any status. When testing frontend via Playwright, ensure to maintain login session by staying on same browser context - Expo Web app loses auth state on direct URL navigation without prior login.

frontend_components.Treatment Progress timeline renders: PASS (screenshot shows Phase 1,2 complete, Phase 3 active)
